column1: A Tornado Warning has been issued for parts of Manatee, Sarasota until Aug 05 3:30AM. Download the ABC Action News App for the latest weather information.
Noo sleep here .. manatee county.. it’s been very Rough.. Pray we all stay Safe !!!
Yes it is, I’m in Palm Aire.
I didn’t think it was going to last so long .. ready for this storm to be over with.. I am in Casa Loma and our pond is running over big time 😳😳
Yes in Sarasota.
we're in Manatee too
same in manatee ( Lakewood ranch )

Guess sleep is not an option... those alerts are never ending even though I am in Nokomis. Began about 7:30 yesterday morning and just will not pass us by. Now thunder and lightening have been added as tornadoes start popping nearby.

I’m ready for it to end Sarasota here. It dies down the frogs go full blast and then seconds later it’s back to the wind with gushes of heavy rain. I’m exhausted but I can’t sleep with the tornado warnings and this wind
same, out here I'm duette. The lightning is insane amd the thunder is such a scary boom. No sleep here either.

same here! Loud thunder has started since the tornado warnings in my area. I might have to either clean house or cook. No sleeping it seems. Between wind rain and noise - it is a busy storm. Nice to know someone else is around.

uff I figured, never seen something like that it was pretty loud
